title: limnas arkansana
intro: Limnas arkansana, also known as Arkansas butterfly-pea, is a type of flowering plant in the pea family that is native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Limnas arkansana include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and dried flowers that can be used to make medicinal remedies.
